text: In the first scene, I feel slightly disoriented; the angled point of view and stark, empty architecture evoke a fleeting sense of instability and anticipation, as if I'm in a transition between spaces both literal and metaphysical. In the second, the bold "R+D" and vibrant wall engage my curiosity, inviting me to contemplate the interplay of human and machine, research and discovery. These scenes together fill me with a mixture of uncertainty and inspiration—a reminder of how new environments urge me to re-evaluate my perception and understanding.
